title: Pungent Australian Stout Grill
description: A crowd-pleasing, no-onion-no-garlic-friendly Australian dish featuring the bold flavors of stout, paired with a rest step for maximum tenderness. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Season the lamb chops with salt, coarse black pepper, and chopped fresh rosemary.
Brush the lamb chops with olive oil and place them in the grill.
Pour the room temperature stout beer into a foil pan and place it near the lamb chops in the grill.
Close the grill and cook for 10 minutes, then reduce the heat to low and cook for 5 more minutes.
Remove the lamb chops from the grill and let them rest for 5 minutes.
Brush the lamb chops with the honey and brown sugar mixture.
Serve the lamb chops hot, garnished with fresh rosemary.
